system.description:
When you use your charisma or force of personality to get information from another person, roll +Charm. If you are trying to use this on a Contact in your Contact List, add the Contact's Rating.

Spend Hold 1-for-1 to ask:

  • What do you or an associate want?
  • What do you or an associate plan to do?
  • What are you or an associate hiding?
  • What is the greatest power of you or your associate?
  • What is the greatest weakness of you or your associate?

failure.value: Hold 1, but the target becomes hostile, or the Director gives you an answer you wish wasn't true.

success.value: Hold 3. Spend Hold 1-for-1 to ask one of the listed questions, and the Director will answer truthfully.

critical.value: Hold 3, and you can ask any question instead of just those listed.
